title: dortmanna erinus
intro: Dortmanna erinus, also known as Sea Pinks or Thrift, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the carnation family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Dortmanna erinus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant's medicinal properties can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
